title: Giving Directions
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct navigational instructions using the Te-form and specify destinations using relative spatial nouns.
instructions: In this roleplay, a tourist asks you for directions to the bank. Reply verbally in Japanese based on the English prompts.

contentItems.text: Make sure to pronounce the double consonant in 'itte' and 'magatte' clearly.

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) Please go straight. 2) Please turn right at the corner. 3) The bank is next to the post office.
scenario: A tourist asking a local for directions on the street.

subTasks.prompt: Tell them the first step. Say: 'Please go straight.'

sampleResponse.targetText: まっすぐ いって ください。

subTasks.prompt: Tell them where to turn. Say: 'Please turn right at the corner.'

sampleResponse.targetText: かどを みぎに まがって ください。
sampleResponse.transliteration: Kado wo migi ni magatte kudasai.
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: Please turn right at the corner.

subTasks.prompt: Tell them the final location. Say: 'The bank is next to the post office.'

sampleResponse.targetText: ぎんこうは ゆうびんきょくの となりに あります。
sampleResponse.transliteration: Ginkou wa yuubinkyoku no tonari ni arimasu.
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: The bank is next to the post office.

scenarioContext.targetText: すみません。ぎんこうへ どうやって いきますか。
scenarioContext.transliteration: Sumimasen. Ginkou e dou yatte ikimasu ka.
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: Excuse me. How do I get to the bank?

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: まっすぐ いって ください。
かどを みぎに まがって ください。
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Kado wo migi ni magatte kudasai.
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Please turn right at the corner.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: ぎんこうは ゆうびんきょくの となりに あります。
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Ginkou wa yuubinkyoku no tonari ni arimasu.
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: The bank is next to the post office.

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Kado wo migi ni magatte kudasai
Say Ginkou wa yuubinkyoku no tonari ni arimasu
acceptableParaphrases: Dropping 'Ginkou wa' in the third sentence is acceptable since the topic is already established.

criteria.name: Te-form Conjugation
criteria.description: Did the learner accurately say 'itte' and 'magatte'?

criteria.name: Particle Usage
criteria.description: Did the learner say 'kado wo' and 'migi ni'?

criteria.name: Location Nouns
criteria.description: Did the learner accurately construct 'yuubinkyoku no tonari'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: まっすぐ いって ください。かどを みぎに まがって ください。ぎんこうは ゆうびんきょくの となりに あります。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You gave perfect directions.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review your particles. It is 'Kado WO migi NI'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you clearly pause for the double consonant in 'ma-ga-t-te'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: すみません。ぎんこうへ どうやって いきますか。まっすぐ いって ください。かどを みぎに まがって ください。ぎんこうは ゆうびんきょくの となりに あります。

hintText: To turn right is Migi Ni Magarimasu. Change it to Te-form: Migi ni magatte kudasai.
commonMistakes: Saying 'Kado ni migi wo' (reversing the particles).
